original_title: Real-Time Analysis and Visualization of Pathogen Sequence Data
title: Real-Time Analysis and Visualization of Pathogen Sequence Data
abstract: The rapid development of sequencing technologies has to led to an explosion of pathogen sequence data, which are increasingly collected as part of routine surveillance or clinical diagnostics. In public health, sequence data are used to reconstruct the evolution of pathogens, to anticipate future spread, and to target interventions.
